_comment: Q3-2026 planning input — SIMPLIFIED for the prioritize/deprioritize scenario. Two pools: (a) BACKLOG carried from past quarters that wasn't fully covered, (b) NEW proposals for Q3. Items flagged decision_required=true are the ones the two agents (Stakeholder=Product, Planning=Eng) debate. The whole list over-runs capacity, so at least one item must be deprioritized — that's the demo.

capacity_envelope._capacity_note: 3 Eng sub-teams (Ingestion, Delivery, Platform) × 13 weeks × 120h/week = 4680h available.
capacity_envelope.delta_verdict: Over capacity by ~500h. At least one decision_required item must be deprioritized or deferred.

backlog_from_past_quarters.name: Delivery Circuit Breakers
backlog_from_past_quarters.origin: Q2-DLV-03 (cut in week 4 to protect utilization)
backlog_from_past_quarters.customer_value: Reliability — auto-isolate failing endpoints, reduces noise for customers receiving webhooks.
backlog_from_past_quarters.effort_risk: Delivery team is also doing Webhook Signatures v2 (Q3-DLV-01). Stacking both risks repeating the Q1 118% peak.
backlog_from_past_quarters.history_note: Cut twice already (once in Q1 scope review, once in Q2 week 4). Re-proposed for Q3.
backlog_from_past_quarters.stakeholder_reason: We've cut this twice; a major customer filed a reliability complaint last month — shipping this protects renewals.
backlog_from_past_quarters.planning_reason: Delivery capacity is committed to Signatures v2 (P0 revenue). Recommend deferring Circuit Breakers to Q4 or scoping to per-tenant only.

backlog_from_past_quarters.name: Ingestion Tech-Debt Remnant (2 of 5 footguns)
backlog_from_past_quarters.origin: Q2-ING-01 (shipped, but closed 3 of 5 known footguns)
backlog_from_past_quarters.customer_value: Indirect — reduces the chance of a repeat of the Q1 rate-limiter incident. No direct revenue line.
backlog_from_past_quarters.effort_risk: Internal work; safe and well-scoped. No customer-facing deadline.
backlog_from_past_quarters.history_note: Q2-ING-01 paid down 3 of 5 footguns; 2 remain. These are the ones that compounded into the Q1 over-commitment.
backlog_from_past_quarters.stakeholder_reason: No customer asks for tech debt. Revenue is on the Q3 proposals — fund those first.
backlog_from_past_quarters.planning_reason: These two footguns are exactly what caused the Q1 122% peak. If we don't clear them before adding Regional Ingestion EU, we repeat Q1.

proposed_for_q3.name: Regional Ingestion (EU)
proposed_for_q3.customer_value: P0 — data-residency blocker for 3 EU enterprise prospects (FY27 pipeline).
proposed_for_q3.effort_risk: 600h on the Ingestion team that still carries the BACKLOG-02 debt remnant. Would push Ingestion to ~115%.
proposed_for_q3.stakeholder_reason: P0 revenue; prospect commitment date is end of Q3.
proposed_for_q3.planning_reason: Cannot safely take all of it alongside the debt remnant. Propose: ship EU ingest endpoint in Q3 (300h), defer regional routing rules + Frankfurt PoP to Q4.

proposed_for_q3.name: Webhook Signatures v2
proposed_for_q3.customer_value: P0 — enterprise security review requires it before contract signature.
proposed_for_q3.planning_reason: Agreed P0. The only caveat is it locks out BACKLOG-01 (Circuit Breakers) — see that item.

proposed_for_q3.name: Replay 2.0 UI
proposed_for_q3.effort_risk: Blocked on Design (shared 40h/wk resource) for the visual builder.
proposed_for_q3.stakeholder_reason: Top ask in the customer advisory board.
proposed_for_q3.planning_reason: Shippable, well-scoped, on the healthy Platform band.

proposed_for_q3.name: Billing: Usage-based Tiers
proposed_for_q3.customer_value: P0 — revenue model change for FY27; finance-mandated.
proposed_for_q3.effort_risk: 420h. Platform is getting crowded (Replay UI, Search, Log Explorer also proposed).
proposed_for_q3.stakeholder_reason: Mandated by finance for FY27 model.
proposed_for_q3.planning_reason: Agreed P0. Will require de-scoping one of the lower Platform items (Search Upgrade / Log Explorer) to make room.

_demo_flow_note: The UI surfaces these 4 + 2 = 6 items across two columns (Backlog | Proposed for Q3). The 3 decision_required items get an explicit Prioritize / Deprioritize button. Clicking it triggers the two agents to emit their 1-line take; the user confirms the final call, which moves the item into the Q3 Committed column or back to Backlog. The capacity envelope (over by 500h) is the forcing function — you literally cannot commit everything.
